onboarding.subtitle: A few questions to personalize your experience

ai_consent.title: AI-powered personalization
ai_consent.subtitle: Fibro uses Claude AI (by Anthropic, Inc.) to generate your personalized insights and welcome message.

insights.ai_off_body: To use insights and chat, turn on AI personalization in your profile settings.

subscription.trial_prompt_subtitle: Unlock your personalized insight report, free for 14 days

ai_chat.consent_off_body: Enable AI personalization in Profile to use this feature. Your data stays yours. We just need your permission first.

insights_extra.insight_weekly_teaser: Your personalized weekly insight will appear here once you have a few days of data.

premium_modal.feature_1_body: Every week, Fibro analyzes your logs and surfaces the patterns driving your symptoms.
premium_modal.feature_4_body: The more context you give, the smarter your insights get. Premium unlocks full AI personalization.
